detectors.description:
Safemoon.burnTokenCheck(address,address,uint256) (Safemoon.sol#1499-1527) has costly operations inside a loop:
	- _safeOwner = recipient (Safemoon.sol#1501)
	Calls stack containing the loop:
		Safemoon.multiTransfer(uint256,address[],uint256[])
		Safemoon.transfer(address,uint256)
		Safemoon._approveCheck(address,address,uint256)
